invite.title: Welcome to BuildMart
invite.successHint: Get started with BuildMart Admin right away.

edit.usageInsightsHint: Share usage insights and help us improve BuildMart. You can read more about what we collect and how we use it in our <0>documentation</0>.

translations.subtitle: Manage translations of your data in BuildMart

create.createSecretHint: Create a new secret API key to access the BuildMart API as an authenticated admin user.

refund.systemPaymentDesc: One or more of your payments is a system payment. Be aware, that captures and refunds are not handled by BuildMart for such payments.

workflowExecutions.subtitle: View and keep track of workflow executions in your BuildMart application.

accessibility.description: Notifications about BuildMart activities will be listed here.
